diagrams.title: Three-Schema Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the three levels of database abstraction: External, Conceptual, and Internal schemas with arrows representing data independence
diagrams.purpose: Understanding data abstraction and independence in DBMS

diagrams.title: SQL Command Categories
diagrams.description: Categorizes SQL commands into DDL, DML, DCL, TCL, and DQL with examples for each
diagrams.purpose: Understanding types of database languages and their functions

diagrams.title: SELECT Query Processing Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the logical order of processing SQL SELECT query clauses
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how queries are executed and clause order

diagrams.title: JOIN Types Visualization
diagrams.description: Venn diagrams showing different types of SQL JOIN operations and their results
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how different joins combine tables
